Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Lafayette
ShortDescription: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Lafayette due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#115 Pullman/115th temporary rerouted in both directions due to street blockage, near 115th/Lafayette.

#115 Pullman/115th buses will operate in both directions via 115th, Michigan, 119th, Wentworth and 115th then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #3 King Drive Temporary Reroute near King Drive/63rd
ShortDescription: #3 King Drive buses Temporary Reroute in both directions due to street blockage at King/63rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#3 King Drive buses Temporary Reroute in both directions due to street blockage at King Drive/63rd.

Northbound buses will operate via King Drive, Marquette, State, 61st and King Drive then r their normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via King Drive, 61st, Indiana, 60th, State, Marquette and King Drive then over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following a mechanical problem. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following a mechanical problem.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
